title: DecisionRecord
description: A signed-off human/agent decision that alters default behavior: waivers (accepted intentional divergences), deferrals, quarantines, and escalation resolutions. Generalizes v1 Waiver into one decision artifact. Framework-neutral: divergence matching is by neutral divergence kinds and semantic-key patterns produced by the trace layer.

type.description: 'waiver' is the v1 Waiver behavior; the others record the human decisions that v1 only tracked as ledger events.

scenarioIds.description: Empty = all scenarios of the units.

match.description: For waivers: machine rule deciding which divergences this decision absorbs. Divergence kinds are neutral (see counterexample.schema.json).

resolution.description: For escalation-resolution decisions: how the blocker was resolved and what budgets were reset.
